title: carex orbicularis subsp. orbicularis
intro: Carex orbicularis subsp. orbicularis, also known as the circular-leaved sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This perennial plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce swelling, and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Carex orbicularis subsp. orbicularis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Carex orbicularis subsp. orbicularis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
